TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Pukpuk ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 2,688 buwan, 6,978 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 18% kyan ku 1,245 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 82% kyan ku 5,733 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 15%, Truku 1%, Bunun 0.5%, Tayan 0.5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pukpuk hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Pukpuk hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Pukpuk hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pukpuk hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Pukpuk hya' ga Isaetipan pahikukian. tay 'llaw na Pukpuk hya' ga Lidaw. tay 'zil na Pukpuk hya' ga Natawran. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pukpuk ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, βunun *.*%, tajan *.*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pukpuk ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na pukpuk ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na pukpuk ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pukpuk ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na pukpuk ħjaʔ ɣa is~ɕaetipan paħikukian. taj ʔllaw na pukpuk ħjaʔ ɣa li*aw. taj ʔzil na pukpuk ħjaʔ ɣa natawran. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Pukpuk ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 2,688 buwan, 6,978 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 18% kyan ku 1,245 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 82% kyan ku 5,733 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 15%, Truku 1%, Bunun 0.5%, Tayan 0.5%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Pukpuk hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Pukpuk hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Pukpuk hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Pukpuk hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Pukpuk hya' ga Isaetipan pahikukian. tay 'llaw na Pukpuk hya' ga Lidaw. tay 'zil na Pukpuk hya' ga Natawran. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ pukpuk ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ **%, truku *%, βunun *.*%, tajan *.*%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na pukpuk ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na pukpuk ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na pukpuk ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na pukpuk ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na pukpuk ħjaʔ ɣa is~ɕaetipan paħikukian. taj ʔllaw na pukpuk ħjaʔ ɣa li*aw. taj ʔzil na pukpuk ħjaʔ ɣa natawran. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
